tools.name: goodreads_api_map_routes
tools.title: Goodreads API Map Routes
tools.description: List bundled Goodreads web/RSS routes. This reads local api-map files and makes no Goodreads request.

tools.name: goodreads_route_search
tools.title: Goodreads Route Search
tools.description: Search mapped Goodreads capabilities such as notes publicizing, friend requests, shelf export, or message folders.

tools.name: goodreads_browser_routes
tools.title: Goodreads Browser Routes
tools.description: List sanitized authenticated Chrome CDP route templates captured from Goodreads.

tools.name: goodreads_bookshelf_move_plan
tools.title: Goodreads Bookshelf Move Plan
tools.description: Build a dry-run form plan for moving one shelf review row. This does not submit anything.

tools.name: goodreads_notes_publicize_plan
tools.title: Goodreads Notes Publicize Plan
tools.description: Build a dry-run plan for publicizing notes/highlights for one book. This does not submit anything.

tools.name: goodreads_request_execute
tools.title: Goodreads Request Execute
tools.description: Execute a live Goodreads web request from the bundled route map. Personal repo has no env write gate; set dryRun true to preview.

tools.name: goodreads_dynamic_inventory_guidance
tools.title: Goodreads Dynamic Inventory Guidance
tools.description: Explain how to discover account-specific shelves, folders, notes modules, pagination, and dynamic sublinks before acting.
